candidates.why: Direct operating revenue line; most specific top-line sales/revenue label and populated.

candidates.why: Best direct cost-of-sales / cost-of-revenue line; specific and populated.
Unclassified row is not populated and is less appropriate than the direct cost line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best recurring interest expense measure; specific and avoids needing to subtract capitalized interest manually.
Same values as net of capitalized interest and also a good candidate, but less specific.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Gross interest before subtracting capitalized interest; less preferred than net-of-capitalized line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Likely a component of total interest expense; selecting it with total interest would risk double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Preferred recurring interest expense line over broader financing totals and avoided combining overlapping components.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best book equity measure because it excludes non-controlling interests and is attributable to parent shareholders.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent-attributable equity line and useful fallback if label changes.
Also matches parent common equity in this statement and can serve as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Less suitable because it includes minority interest and hybrid debt, which would overstate BE.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list of parent-attributable equity labels; excludes lines including minority interest or hybrid debt.
